data.title: AMCO United Holding Announces Board and Committee Structure
data.description:
The latest update is out from AMCO United Holding ( (HK:0630) ).

AMCO United Holding Limited has announced the composition of its board of directors and the structure of its board committees. The board consists of executive directors Mr. Jia Minghui, who serves as Chairman, and Mr. Zhang Hengxin, along with independent non-executive directors Mr. Au Yeung Ming Yin Gordon and Mr. Guo Zhenhui. The company has established three committees: the Audit Committee chaired by Mr. Au Yeung Ming Yin Gordon, the Remuneration Committee chaired by Mr. Au Yeung Ming Yin Gordon, and the Nomination Committee chaired by Mr. Zhang Hengxin. This announcement underscores the company’s commitment to effective corporate governance and strategic oversight, which is crucial for maintaining stakeholder confidence and enhancing operational efficiency.

More about AMCO United Holding

data.title: AMCO United Holding Faces Compliance Challenge Following Director Resignation
data.description:
AMCO United Holding ( (HK:0630) ) has issued an announcement.

AMCO United Holding Limited announced the resignation of Ms. Ye Mengmei as an independent non-executive director and member of several committees, effective 2 October 2025, due to her other business commitments. Her departure leaves the company below the required number of independent non-executive directors and committee members as per the Hong Kong Stock Exchange’s Listing Rules. The company is actively seeking a suitable replacement to comply with these regulations within three months.

More about AMCO United Holding

AMCO United Holding Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda with limited liability, listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. It operates within a diverse industry, focusing on various business commitments, though specific primary products or services are not detailed in the announcement.

data.title: Raffles Interior’s Cash Offer by Han Vision Concludes with Minimal Uptake
data.description:
Raffles Interior Ltd. ( (HK:1376) ) has shared an update.

Raffles Interior Limited, a company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, recently concluded a mandatory unconditional cash offer made by Han Vision Holdings Limited to acquire all issued shares and outstanding convertible notes not already owned by Han Vision. The offer closed on October 2, 2025, without any revisions or extensions. The results showed minimal acceptance, with only 456,000 shares tendered, representing a mere 0.046% of the company’s total issued share capital. Consequently, Han Vision’s stake in Raffles Interior increased slightly to 51.0%. The settlement process for the cash consideration is underway, with remittances expected to be dispatched by October 14, 2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1376) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Raffles Interior Ltd. stock, see the HK:1376 Stock Forecast page.

data.title: XPeng Inc. Achieves Record EV Deliveries and Maintains Top ESG Rating
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from XPeng, Inc. Class A ( (HK:9868) ).

XPeng Inc. reported a significant increase in vehicle deliveries for September and the third quarter of 2025, with a record 41,581 Smart EVs delivered in September, marking a 95% year-over-year increase. The company also achieved a 149% year-over-year increase in deliveries for the third quarter, reaching 116,007 units. Additionally, XPeng’s P7 model became the fastest to achieve 40 jobs per hour on a new production line, and the company maintained its AAA MSCI ESG Rating for the third consecutive year. These achievements highlight XPeng’s strong operational performance and its leading position in the global automotive industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:9868) stock is a Buy with a HK$108.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on XPeng, Inc. Class A stock, see the HK:9868 Stock Forecast page.

More about XPeng, Inc. Class A

XPeng Inc. operates in the electric vehicle (EV) industry, focusing on the production of smart electric vehicles. The company is known for its innovative approach to EV manufacturing and its emphasis on integrating advanced technologies such as ADAS (Advanced Driver Assistance Systems) into its vehicles.

data.title: E-House (China) Implements Measures to Address Financial Challenges
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from E-House (China) Enterprise Holdings Limited ( (HK:2048) ).

E-House (China) Enterprise Holdings Limited has announced measures to address its going concern issue by disposing of 33 assets for RMB11.7 million, repaying bank loans of RMB24.5 million, and reducing staff numbers. The company is committed to improving its financial position through effective cost control and debt restructuring, aiming to ensure liquidity and sustain operations.

More about E-House (China) Enterprise Holdings Limited

E-House (China) Enterprise Holdings Limited operates in the real estate services industry, offering a range of services including real estate agency, brokerage, and consulting. The company focuses on the Chinese market, providing comprehensive real estate solutions to developers, property owners, and investors.

data.title: ISP Holdings Clarifies Share Voting Discrepancy at AGM
data.description:
The latest update is out from ISP Holdings Limited ( (HK:2340) ).

ISP Holdings Limited clarified discrepancies regarding the number of shares eligible for voting at their annual general meeting on 30 May 2025. The company initially reported 424,850,000 shares as eligible, but the actual total was 637,275,000 due to the issuance of 212,425,000 rights shares. This clarification impacts shareholder voting rights and the general mandate for directors to issue or repurchase shares.

More about ISP Holdings Limited
